Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Compelling Accounting By Trustee And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-15-2008 Continued To Jun-17-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jan-29-2008 Continued To Apr-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jaimie Uziel for Anna Carr. Edward Poole for and with Kathleen Basso.

Mr. Poole stated that there was a pending partition action, that Mr. Uziel refused to put the property on the market and that there was still a dispute on some money issues. The Court informed the parties that the accounting could not be approved and suggested the parties getting together to narrow down the issues. The Court referred the matter to Pro Bono Mediation, (signing the order for the same in open court). Mediation must be completed no later than April 8, 2008. The status on mediation is set for April 15, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Compelling Accounting By Trustee And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-29-2008 Continued To Apr-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Continued To Jan-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jaimie Uziel for Anna Carr.

Mr. Uziel stated that there was some confusion about todays hearing, that the supplemental accounting had been filed today, and requested a continuance to allow counsel to respond. The matter was continued to January 29, 2008. Mr. Uziel will give notice.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Rich Lee.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Compelling Accounting By Trustee And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Continued To Jan-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Oct-31-2007 Continued To Dec-04-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Poole for and with Kathleen Basso. Jaime Uziel for Anna Carr (Trustee).

Mr. Poole objected to the accounting stating that it was not detailed enough. The Court stated that the accounting was not in proper form. Mr. Uziel expressed that the accounting was done in a good faith attempt and that he was willing to file a supplemental accounting. The Court directed Mr. Uziel to file a formal accounting to the best of his ability and stated that all objections must done in writing and specific as to the issues. Both matters were continued to December 4, 2007.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Doug Handa.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Compelling Accounting By Trustee And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-31-2007 Continued To Dec-04-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Compelling Accounting By Trustee And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-24-2007 Continued To Oct-31-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. The ROA showed hearing set on 10/31 for the accounting but no notice of hearing on the ROA. Matter is continued to 10/31.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Rob Harris.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Compelling Accounting By Trustee And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-06-2007 Continued To Sep-24-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: EDWARD POOLE, APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER, JAMES C. UZIEL APPEARING FOR ANA CARR, KATHLEEN J. BASSCO PETITIONER
MR. UZIEL STATES THAT THE PROPERTY HAS BEEN CONVEYED OUT OF THE TRUST AND THAT THEY ARE WORKING ON AN ACCOUNTING. MR. POOLE STATES THAT HE RECIEVED NO NOTICE OF THE CONVEYANCE AND HAS NOT SEEN A COPY OF THE ACCOUNTING AND WOULD LIKE TO DO SO. THE COURT QUESTIONS WHAT IS THERE TO ACCOUNT FOR? MR. UZIEL STATES THE THERE ARE EXPENSES STEMING FROM REPAIRS DONE THE PROPERTY. HE ALSO STATES THAT THERE ARE PROBLEMS GETTING THE DOCUMENTATIONS, BUT THAT HE IS WORKING ON IT. IT WAS ALSO SAID THE THERE HAS BEEN NO ACCOUNTING FOR NINE YEARS. THE COURT CONTINUED THIS MATTER UNTIL 9/24/07. ALSO, THE ACCOUNTING IS TO BE FILED ON BEFORE SAID DATE. COUNSEL IS TO SERVE NOTICE TO EVERYONE.
COMMISSIONER,DOROTHYMCMATH:REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN,CSR #11722, CLERK:LARISA DOTSON,BALIFF:
J.GUITRON
